description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle featuring a tan and black color scheme, equipped with a telescoping stock, a detachable box magazine, and a vertical foregrip for enhanced control. The rifle is fitted with a scope mounted on the top rail for precision aiming, and a suppressor attached to the end of the barrel for reduced muzzle noise. A tan sling is attached for easier carrying, and the handguard has a rail system for mounting accessories. The overall build suggests a lightweight yet durable construction, likely using polymer and metal components. The rifle's ergonomic pistol grip and adjustable stock make it suitable for various user preferences and operational scenarios. Its design is optimized for urban environments, offering both maneuverability and tactical versatility.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a tan and black finish, featuring a scope, suppressor, vertical foregrip, and adjustable stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, suppressor, vertical foregrip, and sling.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor, barrel alignment, and the vertical foregrip beneath the handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, scope, and stock, with the sling visible along the lower edge.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, scope mount, and the alignment of the suppressor and barrel.
